doc:
The BalanceManager is a shared object that holds all of the balances for different assets. A combination of `BalanceManager` and
 `TradeProof` are passed into a pool to perform trades. A `TradeProof` can be generated in two ways: by the
 owner directly, or by any `TradeCap` owner. The owner can generate a `TradeProof` without the risk of
 equivocation. The `TradeCap` owner, due to it being an owned object, risks equivocation when generating
 a `TradeProof`. Generally, a high frequency trading engine will trade as the default owner.

Assigned: This function is deprecated, use `new_with_custom_owner` instead.

new_with_custom_owner.doc: Create a new balance manager with an owner.

Assigned: This function is deprecated, use `new_with_custom_owner_caps` instead.
This function is deprecated, use `set_balance_manager_referral` instead.

set_balance_manager_referral.doc: Set the referral for the balance manager.

Assigned: This function is deprecated, use `unset_balance_manager_referral` instead.

unset_balance_manager_referral.doc: Unset the referral for the balance manager.

balance.doc: Returns the balance of a Coin in a balance manager.

mint_trade_cap.doc: Mint a `TradeCap`, only owner can mint a `TradeCap`.

mint_deposit_cap.doc: Mint a `DepositCap`, only owner can mint.

mint_withdraw_cap.doc: Mint a `WithdrawCap`, only owner can mint.

revoke_trade_cap.doc:
Revoke a `TradeCap`. Only the owner can revoke a `TradeCap`.
 Can also be used to revoke `DepositCap` and `WithdrawCap`.

generate_proof_as_owner.doc:
Generate a `TradeProof` by the owner. The owner does not require a capability
 and can generate TradeProofs without the risk of equivocation.

generate_proof_as_trader.doc:
Generate a `TradeProof` with a `TradeCap`.
 Risk of equivocation since `TradeCap` is an owned object.

deposit.doc: Deposit funds to a balance manager. Only owner can call this directly.

deposit_with_cap.doc: Deposit funds into a balance manager by a `DepositCap` owner.

withdraw_with_cap.doc: Withdraw funds from a balance manager by a `WithdrawCap` owner.

withdraw.doc:
Withdraw funds from a balance_manager. Only owner can call this directly.
 If withdraw_all is true, amount is ignored and full balance withdrawn.
 If withdraw_all is false, withdraw_amount will be withdrawn.

Assigned: This function is deprecated, use `register_balance_manager` instead.
This function is deprecated, use `get_balance_manager_referral_id` instead.

get_balance_manager_referral_id.doc: Get the referral id from the balance manager.

owner.doc: Returns the owner of the balance_manager.

id.doc: Returns the owner of the balance_manager.

Assigned: This function is deprecated, use `balance_manager_referral_owner` instead.

deposit_with_proof.doc: Deposit funds to a balance_manager. Pool will call this to deposit funds.

deposit_permissionless.doc:
Deposit funds to a balance_manager. Pool will call this to deposit funds.
 This function is used by withdraw_settled_amounts_permissionless to deposit funds.

withdraw_with_proof.doc: Withdraw funds from a balance_manager. Pool will call this to withdraw funds.

delete.doc:
Deletes a balance_manager.
 This is used for deleting temporary balance_managers for direct swap with pool.

BalanceManager.doc: A shared object that is passed into pools for placing orders.

BalanceManagerEvent.doc: Event emitted when a new balance_manager is created.

BalanceEvent.doc: Event emitted when a deposit or withdrawal occurs.

TradeCap.doc: Owners of a `TradeCap` need to get a `TradeProof` to trade across pools in a single PTB (drops after).

DepositCap.doc: `DepositCap` is used to deposit funds to a balance_manager by a non-owner.

WithdrawCap.doc: WithdrawCap is used to withdraw funds from a balance_manager by a non-owner.

Assigned: This struct is deprecated, replaced by `DeepBookPoolReferral`.

TradeProof.doc:
BalanceManager owner and `TradeCap` owners can generate a `TradeProof`.
 `TradeProof` is used to validate the balance_manager when trading on DeepBook.
